---
title: "Practical AI for small business"
body-classes: landing-page
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.container}
::: {.eyebrow}
Landing Page
:::

# Practical AI for small business

Southern Clarity helps teams adopt AI with clear, practical solutions that save time and improve decisions.

::: {.hero-actions}
[Talk to us](contact.qmd){.button}
[What we focus on](#services){.button .button-secondary}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.section .container #services}
## What we focus on

::: {.template-grid}
::: {.template-card}
### Automation
Cut repetitive work with lightweight AI-powered workflows.
:::

::: {.template-card}
### Knowledge
Turn company documents into quick, searchable answers.
:::

::: {.template-card}
### Support
Deploy assistant experiences tailored to your customers.
:::
:::
:::
